name: Company Brain
description: The HTTP face of the Company Brain: POST /ask publishes a BrainQuestionAsked on the bus (asking is decoupled from answering), and GET /answers serves a per-tenant, newest-first log of the grounded answers the Brain Query agent re-enters as BrainAnswered — so a UI can hold a conversation without touching the AI layer.
author: FactoryOS

api.description: Pose a question to the Company Brain. Publishes a BrainQuestionAsked on the bus and returns 202 with the question id; the grounded answer arrives asynchronously and surfaces at GET /answers.
A tenant's most recent grounded Brain answers, newest first, each with its question, model and knowledge citations.
Answer-log headline for a tenant: total grounded answers kept and a per-model tally, ordered by count descending.
